name: kr.ai.vdb/vdb
description: Check packages for CVEs, slopsquatting, and CISA KEV before your AI agent installs them.

environmentVariables.name: VDB_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: VDB instance origin. Defaults to the hosted https://vdb.ai.kr.

environmentVariables.name: VDB_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional vdb_… API key for unmetered per-account access (free at https://vdb.ai.kr/signup). Anonymous use gets a per-IP trial.
